name: Eggplant Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup packed fresh basil leaves, washed well and spun dry
1 eggplant, cut crosswise into 1/2-inch thick slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat grill pan.
2. In a blender, combine oil, lemon juice, mustard, garlic paste, and half of the basil. Blend until smooth.
3. Reserve half of the dressing in a measuring cup and the remaining in a large bowl. Toss the remaining dressing with eggplant slices.
4. Grill the eggplant slices in a grill pan over medium heat for 6-7 minutes on each side.
5. Arrange the grilled eggplant and remaining basil on a platter.
6. Drizzle the salad with the reserved dressing and sprinkle with pine nuts.
Yield: 4 to 6 servings
